mapper.sql: id, public_id, tenant_id, code, name, type, status, address_json, contact_json, opening_hours_json, created_at, created_by, updated_at, updated_by, deleted_at, version
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tnt_library ( public_id, tenant_id, code, name, type, status, address_json, contact_json, opening_hours_json, created_by, updated_by ) VALUES ( #{publicId}, #{tenantId}, #{code}, #{name}, #{type,typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumTypeHandler}, #{status,typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumTypeHandler}, CAST(#{addressJson} AS jsonb), CAST(#{contactJson} AS jsonb), CAST(#{openingHoursJson} AS jsonb), #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy} )
mapper.select: SELECT FROM tnt_library WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tnt_library WHERE LOWER(code) = LOWER(#{code}) AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT FROM tnt_library
ORDER BY id DESC OFFSET #{offset} LIMIT #{limit}
